news.t: VanEck Launches Office and Commercial REIT ETF (DESK)

holdings.infoBox: DESK is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vornado Realty Trust stock at 11.76%, Cousins Properties at 10.33%, BXP, Inc. at 10.30%, SL Green Realty at 8.57%, and COPT Defense Properties at 7.93%.

overview.description: The VanEck Office and Commercial REIT ETF (DESK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a tiered modified market-cap weighted index composed of US-listed Office and Commercial REITs. The fund targets the top 25 highest ranked Office and Commerical REITs based on market cap and liquidity DESK was launched on Sep 19, 2023 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: MarketVector US Listed Office And Commercial REITS Index

data.title: VanEck Launches Office and Commercial REIT ETF (DESK)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck is today launching the VanEck Office and Commercial REIT ETF (DESK), the only ETF that offers focused exposure to U.S. office REITs.
